productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and black striped shirt, made of a cotton blend fabric, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Slim Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Break the monotony and get stylish in your formal wear with this striped shirt from the After Hours collection of peter england. Crafted from a cotton blend fabric to offer wrinkle-free comfort, this striped formal shirt from Peter England is stitched to perfection and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
